subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who caused His servant to journey, in a moment of the day, unto a station that was hidden from all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی اسری بعبده فی لحظه من النهار الی مقام کان مستورا عن العالمین و
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
